expectations.text: Uses Zod or equivalent schema for response parsing
expectations.evidence: No schema validation library is imported or used. The code relies on an axios generic type parameter, which is compile-time only.

expectations.text: Type derived from schema (z.infer or equivalent), not a hand-written interface
expectations.evidence: UserProfile is a hand-written interface at lines 5-10. No schema inference is used.

expectations.text: Parsing happens at the API boundary function, not deferred to consumers
expectations.evidence: No runtime parsing occurs. response.data is returned with only a TypeScript generic cast, not a .parse() or .safeParse() call.

expectations.text: Uses named export, not default export
expectations.evidence: Line 12 uses export async function getUserProfile, which is a named export.

assertion_critique: Assertion 4 (named export) passes without the skill -- non-discriminating for this eval
